biography: Olli, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, hails from Hirsala Golf and brings a unique blend of skill and passion to the competition.

A dedicated follower of Bryson DeChambeau, Olli admires the innovative and analytical approach to golf, often seen meticulously charting courses and calculating optimal strategies. Beyond the course, Olli is known for his jovial nature and camaraderie, making him a popular figure among fellow competitors.

With nine appearances in past Hector Trophée tournaments, Olli has proven himself a formidable player. His dedication and perseverance culminated in a memorable victory, securing the coveted Hector Trophée once and also earning the Victor Trophy once to celebrate individual excellence. Although Olli is not currently slated to participate in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026, his presence is always felt, and fans remain hopeful for a possible return in the future.
